reference: I just had an electrocardiogram as a preoperative test. It shows that I have a probable left atrial abnormality. I have been diagnosed in years past with mitral valve prolapse and possible premature ventricular contraction issues. Could today's test be a reflection of those problems, or do you think it may be another problem?
text: I just had an electrocardiogram as a preoperative test. It shows that I have a probable left atrial abnormality. I have been diagnosed in years past with mitral valve prolapse and possible premature ventricular contraction issues.
